canonical_rules.requirement: Golden suite checks must be deterministic and cannot update expected outputs during release checks.
canonical_rules.failure_mode: golden check rewrites expected output while reporting pass

canonical_rules.requirement: Integration suite checks must cover CLI, adapters, program driver, recovery, review gates, lock gates, and write scopes.
canonical_rules.failure_mode: release readiness passes without gate-stop integration coverage

canonical_rules.requirement: Release suite checks must include package dry-run, example project smoke, migration coverage, and release readiness packet verification.
canonical_rules.failure_mode: package or example readiness is assumed from unit tests

canonical_rules.requirement: Every v3.1 capability row must have a supported migration status, evidence reference, and rationale.
Release lock eligibility requires P4_SPEC_LOCK, P4_BUILD_LOCK, passing release evidence, package evidence, migration evidence, and explicit human authorization.
canonical_rules.failure_mode: release lock is eligible from spec approval alone

canonical_rules.requirement: P4-SPEC-03 cannot add product requirements, page elements, layout rules, or business contracts.
canonical_rules.failure_mode: migration or example project fills missing product semantics
